evidence-binding: n1-architect 10e1be01f296
files_to_create: (1) templates/axioms.md [owner n4] — root-only canonical five-axiom file, NO per-edition byte copies; text reaches editions by EMBEDDING into byte-locked surfaces (precedent templates/routing/*.skeleton.md). (2) agents/profiles/higher/issue-scout.md [owner n3] — FULL body copy of agents/issue-scout.md with model: opus (installed AS the agent under --profile=higher, not a stub).
files_to_modify: n3=install.sh (2 edits: model_for_placeholder case @411-424 + render placeholders array @461-474). n4=ALL SIX workflow-init surfaces (commands/workflow-init.md + gitlab/gitea mirrors + 3 kaola-workflow-init/SKILL.md) — "workflow-init template" EXPANDS to 6 due to the byte-lock (validate-kaola-workflow-contracts.js:479-545); embed `## First Principles` inside the KW-CLAUDE-TEMPLATE region; avoid Phase<n>/phase-file naming (#572 bans). n5=templates/routing/next.skeleton.md (+ slots.js only if a keyed splice is chosen) then regenerate the 6 next surfaces via generate-routing-surfaces.js --write. n6=templates/routing/required-blocks.js, scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js (axioms.md↔embedded-init drift guard), sync-opencode-edition.js --write (→ .opencode/command/*), optional positive assert in test-install-model-rendering.js.
build_sequence: n3 → n4 → n5 → n6 → all-four-chains. This IS a #307 cross-edition diff (plugins/*/commands+skills, install.sh, edition validators, routing generator) → run with KAOLA_RUN_CHAINS_CONCURRENCY=serial. Also run test-opencode-edition.js (additive, no #307 obligation of its own). n3∥n4 are disjoint (install.sh vs axioms.md+six init surfaces) → valid co-open pair.

## Key verified decisions
- Axiom home = templates/axioms.md (root-only canonical). adaptive-schema.js is byte-copied because scripts require() it (validate-script-sync.js:178-185); the axiom file has NO runtime require() consumer, templates/ is root-only, and its text reaches editions by embedding into byte-locked surfaces. Per-edition copies would violate axiom #3. Drift guard = one walkthrough assertion (axioms.md == embedded init block).
- The "six routing surfaces" for BOTH the axiom pointer AND the scout model= are the `next` topic (workflow-next ×3 commands + kaola-workflow-next ×3 skills), GENERATED from templates/routing/next.skeleton.md. n5 MUST edit the skeleton + regenerate (generate-routing-surfaces.js --write), never hand-edit six files — --check runs in all four chains.
- Axiom pointer = SHARED skeleton body (all 6 surfaces); scout model= = REGION:command (3 command surfaces only). install.sh renders COMMANDS only; NO SKILL.md carries any {X_MODEL} placeholder (grep=0). Codex skills get prose-only scout dispatch (matches the model-less issue-scout.toml twins). A placeholder in the shared body would LEAK {ISSUE_SCOUT_MODEL} into codex skills → must be REGION:command.
- #646 = exact code-reviewer/CODE_REVIEWER_MODEL analogy. base issue-scout.md=sonnet, new higher/issue-scout.md=opus, wire ISSUE_SCOUT_MODEL into install.sh's model_for_placeholder case (411-424) + render placeholders array (461-474). DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS/REASONING_FLOOR_ROLES/REQUIRED_AGENTS/default_agent_model UNCHANGED (issue-scout already present). opencode roleTier reads BASE sonnet → no opencode tier change.
- Six-surface enforcement rides required-blocks.js (single source, consumed by test-route-reachability.js:541). Add a both/both axiom block + fold scout model="{ISSUE_SCOUT_MODEL}" into the nx-router-command block. Forge-neutral → no RESIDUAL_ALLOWLIST.
- opencode auto-handled: sync-opencode-edition.js:364-365 generic regex drops the scout placeholder; axiom prose propagates via transform. n6 runs sync-opencode-edition.js --write + test-opencode-edition.js.

## CONFLICT / COUPLING FLAGS
1. required-blocks.js sits in templates/routing/ (n5 dir) but is n6 enforcement — assign to n6, build order n5→n6. (VERIFY against frozen write-sets before dispatch.)
2. Scout model= is a two-node contract: n5 authors the placeholder in surfaces, n3 wires install.sh. If either missing, test-install-model-rendering.js:85 REDS on the leftover placeholder. n3 before n5 (DAG-enforced: n5 deps n3).
3. n4→n5 semantic dep (pointer references the axioms n4 embeds); disjoint files.
4. n6 depends on n4+n5 landed (opencode regen + drift guard read canonical init+next).

## Top risks
byte-identity divergence (n4 six-init parity + axioms.md==embedded); six-surface hand-edit reds --check (n5: shared-body for pointer, REGION:command for placeholder); install.sh two-list plumbing (n3); provenance-free prose (no #NNN/D-NNN on shipped surfaces — n9 owns CHANGELOG/decisions).
